feedback: Push notifications fire for every comment even after I am no longer responsible for the project.
Mobile search helps account teams find customer notes quickly before a meeting.
The mobile app should let me mute a workspace for a week instead of disabling all notifications.
I like checking saved reports from my phone before roadmap meetings.
The app is useful, but table rows are hard to scan on a small screen.
Our sales team wants direct links from mobile feedback items to the related report.
Mobile filters should remember my last selected sentiment and plan.
The evidence panel is readable on tablet and helps during customer calls.
Scrolling through long quotes on mobile feels slow when a report has many sources.
The mobile summary is concise enough for executives who only need the main risk and action.
